xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfContactPerson: Sri R Ganesh, Vice President - Finance and Projects
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheCompanyOrLLPOrFirmOfA: M/s. PKF Sridhar and Santhanam LLP
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProductOrServiceSoldByTheEntit: Parts and accessories for motor vehicles
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: The Company manufactures a diverse range of products for varied customers segments namely from automotive, wind energy, aerospace, defence, farm equipment and industrial amongst others with significant contribution coming from the automotive segment.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheHoldingOrSubsidiaryAs: Cramlington Precision Forge Limited, United Kingdom

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: This is critical for reducing and managing emissions and moving towards de-carbonization.
This represents the company's responsibility towards managing waste generated in the business and transitioning towards environmental preservation.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Through partnerships with Pollution Control Board authorized agencies, waste has been diverted from landfill to Pre-processors and recyclers.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: This implies the company's judicious use of a shared resource as our operations are located in water scarce areas.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Constant efforts (recycling of water) are being made to lower the consumption of water in processes and domestic use, and to promote recycling and reusing of water wherever possible. Increase in consumption of treated water quantity from wastewater treatment plants and rainwater harvesting thereby reducing freshwater withdrawal.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: This holds significance as it is crucial for brand reputation and ensuring customer and end-user safety.
To care about the flora and fauna around the Company's operations is equally important
SFL always stands for the rights and respect of its employees and firmly believes in non-tolerance and non-discrimination.
Employee wellbeing is utmost importance to SFL. SFL continously works towards the mental, physical, and financial needs of its employees.
SFL continously strives to provide a safe workplace for its employees
Enabling employees to grow professionally as well as upskill them at work is cornerstone to SFL's success as an organisation.
SFL firmly believes in providing opportunities to everyone and thereby becoming an inclusive organisation.
SFL continously works to privide for and uplift the communities around its operations and cater to the needs of the under privileged.
Working ethically is central to long term sustenance of an organization. This is central to the company's vision.
Management of supply chain is crucial in manufacturing the products and thereby meeting the Company's business objectives.
Consistent profitability and strong financial fundamentals are necessary for the business to remain resilient and expand globally.
To become a trusted and preferred player in the market is important to growth as an organization.
Stakeholders hold great significance inside and outside the organization.
This emphazises privacy and confidentiality of information of all stakeholder groups involved across the organization.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The Company has adopted leading industry security standard and practices to develop and impliment a robust information security management framework.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Innovation is imperative for building new products and meeting the needs of company's customers.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheNationalAndInternatio: SFL is certified with IATF 16949, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO/IEC 17025. All units are ISO 45001 certified except one unit, which is expected to achive the certification in the ensuing year.
SFL is certified with IATF 16949, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO/IEC 17025. All units are ISO 45001 certified except one unit, which is expected to achive the certification in the ensuing year.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: The statement by Ms. Arathi Krishna, Managing Director forms part of the ESG report available at https://sundram.com/esgreport.php
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT: Ms. Arathi Krishna, Managing Director is responsible for decision making on sustainability related issues.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AnyOtherReasonsIfPoliciesNotCo: Considering the nature of Company's business, principle 7 has limited applicability. The Company complies with Regulations governing its operartions and has taken initiatives to promote inclusive growth and environmental sustainability.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: The members of the Board and KMPs are apprised of developments as part of regulatory updates about the changes in various regulations related for Sundram Fasteners Limited. Additionally, presentations on selected topics is also made to the risk management committee.

The members of the Board and KMPs are apprised of developments as part of regulatory updates about the changes in various regulations related for Sundram Fasteners Limited. Additionally, presentations on selected topics is also made to the risk management committee.

-Customer Focus -Process/ Operational excellence -Finance to Non-Finance -Leading leaders to leadership -Lean Six Sigma -CQ19 (Heat Treat System Assessment) -World Class Supply Chain Management -SOP Mastery -Big Picture Thinking -IR Practice and Legal Compliance -Team Development Program -Woman Wellbeing Workshop -Communicate to Succeed - Enhancing Interpersonal Effectivenss Across Teams-Behavior Based Safety - Create a workable budget
Health and safety, and skill updation
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol:
The organnization's business-as-usual activities, strategies, manufacturing systems and stakeholder engagement practices are guided by its policies such as the Code of Conduct, Code of Fair Practices, and Whistleblower Policy, covering the internal stakeholders, thereby promoting a transparent business culture, a safe working environment and increased long-term stakeholders' sustainable value.
The Code of Conduct policy document ensures compliance with the regulatory requirements, including but not limited to anti-corruption or anti-bribery policy, lays out the roles and responsibilities to be carried out with honesty and integrity.
The policy is available on the company's website: www.sundram.com
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheEntityHaveProcesse: The Code of conduct defines clauses related to conflict of interest, confidentiality maintenance, protection of assests, and corporate opportunities to avoid exploitation of organisation properties for personal gain.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: The programs include providing training on processes and topics such as 5S, Safety, product inspection and handling FMEA, SOP, 7QC tools, QC story and tools, Kaizen, Quality Manual, Kanban, Green Supply Chain, PPAP(Production Part approval process), ESG and other Quality Management Systems related topics. Total Quality Management (TQM) training is extended to sub-contractors to support them in manufacturing and supplying high quality products.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImprovementsInEnviron: Capex investments in renewable energy projects and other specific technologies/ equipment to improve environmental and social aspects.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS:
The products manufactured by the Company are engineered to OEM's specifications that are directly integrated into the assembly and consequently the end-of-life reclamation does not apply to the products dealt by the Company.
To comply with Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB)s Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) requirements, the Company responsibly offset the plastic packaging consumption by engaging authorized third-party agencies to collect and process an equivalent quantity of plastic waste from the environment. The Company also procured plastic credits equivalent to the waste generated for one of its factories in compliance with the Plastic Waste Management Rules.

The products manufactured by the Company are engineered to OEM's specifications that are directly integrated into the assembly and consequently the end-of-life reclamation does not apply to the products dealt by the Company.
To comply with Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB)s Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) requirements, the Company responsibly offset the plastic packaging consumption by engaging authorized third-party agencies to collect and process an equivalent quantity of plastic waste from the environment. The Company also procured plastic credits equivalent to the waste generated for one of its factories in compliance with the Plastic Waste Management Rules.

The products manufactured by the Company are engineered to OEM's specifications that are directly integrated into the assembly and consequently the end-of-life reclamation does not apply to the products dealt by the Company.
To comply with Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB)s Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) requirements, the Company responsibly offset the plastic packaging consumption by engaging authorized third-party agencies to collect and process an equivalent quantity of plastic waste from the environment. The Company also procured plastic credits equivalent to the waste generated for one of its factories in compliance with the Plastic Waste Management Rules.

The products manufactured by the Company are engineered to OEM's specifications that are directly integrated into the assembly and consequently the end-of-life reclamation does not apply to the products dealt by the Company.
To comply with Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB)s Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) requirements, the Company responsibly offset the plastic packaging consumption by engaging authorized third-party agencies to collect and process an equivalent quantity of plastic waste from the environment. The Company also procured plastic credits equivalent to the waste generated for one of its factories in compliance with the Plastic Waste Management Rules.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple2ExplanatoryText: In compliance with Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) Regulation, 100% of our packing material is reclaimed and processed through Authorized Plastic Waste Processors.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfEqualOppertunityPolic: Equal opportunity employment process is reflected throughout SFL's policies and procedures. SFL deos not discriminate employment opportunities based on race, colour, caste, community, language, gender, national, origin, age or disability.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: Proper channels have been provided for workers and employees of the Company to discuss any workplace-related complaints with their factory Human Resource (HR) personnel. There is also a provision of an escalation matrix if their concerns are not satisfactorily resolved ie through immediate supervisor/ Head of Department/ Unit of Divisional HR heads/ Unit Head/ Divisional Presidents/ Head HR/ Management.

Proper channels have been provided for workers and employees of the Company to discuss any workplace-related complaints with their factory Human Resource (HR) personnel. There is also a provision of an escalation matrix if their concerns are not satisfactorily resolved ie through immediate supervisor/ Head of Department/ Unit of Divisional HR heads/ Unit Head/ Divisional Presidents/ Head HR/ Management.

Proper channels have been provided for workers and employees of the Company to discuss any workplace-related complaints with their factory Human Resource (HR) personnel. There is also a provision of an escalation matrix if their concerns are not satisfactorily resolved ie through immediate supervisor/ Head of Department/ Unit of Divisional HR heads/ Unit Head/ Divisional Presidents/ Head HR/ Management.

Proper channels have been provided for workers and employees of the Company to discuss any workplace-related complaints with their factory Human Resource (HR) personnel. There is also a provision of an escalation matrix if their concerns are not satisfactorily resolved ie through immediate supervisor/ Head of Department/ Unit of Divisional HR heads/ Unit Head/ Divisional Presidents/ Head HR/ Management.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: SFL has implemented occupational health and safety measures across all the manufacturing locations. All locations are ISO 45001 certified except one unit, which is expected to achieve the certification in the ensuing year.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: Each site at SFL has its own safety department and its own safety goals and objectives. The sites follow the Plan, Do, Check, Act (PDCA) framework in meeting the objectives. Once the PDCA is complete, it is followed by the assessment of safety impacts. To identify the safety-related risks across all the sites, the company performs Hazard Identification and Risk Assessment (HIRA).
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: Company's top management conducts timely review of all the factories with regards to Health and Safety compliance. External application is used by factories to monitor legal compliance. The factories also conduct monthly safety audits, and the critical areas are identified, tracked, and closed. Employees and Workers at all levels receive relevant and necessary Health and Safety Executive training and education periodically.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: The workers are involved in case of any safety related incident and their feedback is collected on how the incident could have been mitigated. The safety teams prepare risk reduction strategies and implement the necessary measures to enhance the safety standards of the workspace.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMeasuresUndertakenByT: Every month invoice from the value chain partners is processed upon production of documents evidencing remittance for the previous month.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: The Company has mapped its internal and external stakeholders based on the impact of the stakeholders on the Company's operations. It uses both formal and informal mechanisms to engage with various stakeholders to understand their concerns and expectations. Individual departments within the organization have roles and responsibilities identified and defined to engage with various stakeholders. The company has developed a stakeholder engagement framework that outlines how the company will engage with each stakeholder group to address their needs and concerns and build mutually beneficial relationships.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideTheProcessesForConsulta: Making use of both formal and informal channels, the Company interacts with stakeholders to learn about the economic, environmental and social concerns that are important to them. Throughout these interactions, the Company keeps stakeholders informed about the organization's development and solicit their input, ideas, needs and concerns.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesAsToHowTheIn: SFL's primary ESG material topics have been determined through stakeholder discussions. Taking the inputs into consideration, the Company has developed strategies to mitigate the risks arising from material topics.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesOfEngagement: SFL takes part in community engagements predominantly focusing on education and healthcare for vulnerable groups. In early 90s, certain requests of people of Aviyur village near SFL Krishnapuram operations were considered and SFL's leadership decided to bring education to the community through development of a school. It was decided to start an English medium school for people from the village offering quality education. The Sundram Medical Centre was established to support and offer free healthcare facilities to the villages near SFL's Krishnapuram operations. This medical centre has benefitted over 2,500 families by providing them with quality medical care and enabling education and training for poeple on health-related aspects. SFL offers financial support for the Sundram Matriculation Higher Secondary School and Sundram Medical Centre.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Internal communication platforms, Learning and Development programs, Engagement initiatives.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: High Performance Work Culture, Talent development and retention, fulfilment of Company's vision, mission and achieving sustainablitiy objectives, Professional capacity building, Cordial industrial relation, Occupational health and safety, and safe working environment.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Digital platforms and applications, In-person engagement, Customer satisfaction survey, Feedback mechanisms.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Product and service quality, Complaint resolution, On-time delivery.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: In-person engagement, Supplier meetings, Supplier assessment, Training and workshops.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Product and service quality, Complaint resolution, On-time delivery.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Press releases and publications, Investor conferences and Meetings, Annual General Meetings, Stock Exchange announcements.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Financial performace, Business updates, Growth plans, Product innovation pipeline, ESG performance.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Compliance related filings, announcements in the website and paper advertisement.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Statutory compliance requirements: environmental, social and governance.
Improved access to healthcare, education, Welfare measures and financial assistance to the underprivileged, Community development measures.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: Proper channels have been provided for workers and employees to discuss any workplace-related complaints with their individual HR. There is also a provision of an escalation matrix if their concerns are not satisfactorily resolved.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons:
The Company's policy protects complainants wishing to raise a concern about any serious irregularities within the Company. Employees are assured that they will not be identified as the complainant and that the information received is truly confidential.
The Code of Conduct also includes provisions that address topics such as discrimination, harassement, ethical behavior among others that fosters a sense of trust and safety, promotes, and enhances the overall reputation of an organization.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: There has been no such event requiring the Company to modify/ introduce a process as a result of addressing human rights grievances/ complaints.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheScopeAndCoverageOf: The coverage of human rights policy being exercised at the Company is applicable to all stakeholders and not merely restricted to the employees in the workplace.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyIfAnyIn: Reasonable assurance has been undertaken by PKF Sridhar & Santhanam LLP on the indicators in the table above for Standalone figures for FY2025-26, in accordance with SSAE 3000.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyInCaseA: Reasonable assurance has been undertaken by PKF Sridhar & Santhanam LLP on the indicators in the table above for Standalone figures for FY2025-26, in accordance with SSAE 3000.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyThatUnd: Reasonable assurance has been undertaken by PKF Sridhar & Santhanam LLP on the indicators in the table above for Standalone figures for FY2025-26, in accordance with SSAE 3000 and SAE 3410.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfCoverageAndImplementa: The Company has implemented Zero Liquid Discharge (ZLD) across most of the units, eliminating discharge of wastewater. At Uttarkhand Unit, in order to comply with the Common Effluent Treatment Plant (CETP) requirements to provide water to the nearby locality, the primary treated wastewater is being discharged to CETP for further use.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyThatUnd: Reasonable assurance has been undertaken by PKF Sridhar & Santhanam LLP on the indicators in the table above for Standalone figures for FY2025-26, in accordance with SSAE 3000 and SAE 3410.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProjectRelatedToReduc: The Company will be implementing measures to lower Scope 1 emissions by reducing the dependency on higher Global Warming Potentials (GWP) refrigerants to lower / alternative GWP refrigerants, reducing the power outages from Electricity Boards by upgradation to dedicated feeders thereby reducing Diesel consumption for diesel generators , replacing fossils fuel based heating to electric heating in process, Usage of electric vehicles for in-bound logistics, usage of battery energy storage to meet minor power outage requirements. The Company is reducing its Scope 2 emission intensity through procurement of renewable energy, installation of onsite solar power plants and implementation of energy efficiency measures. The Company procures around 64% of the power from renewable sources.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyThatUnd: Reasonable assurance has been undertaken by PKF Sridhar & Santhanam LLP on the indicators in the table above for Standalone figures for FY2025-26, in accordance with SSAE 3000.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: Through partnerships with authorized agencies, the Company constantly strives to develop mechanisms of recyling and reusing hazardous waste generated across its operations. Since the majority of the Company's products are composed of steel, the MS scrap generated is being recycled and re-used by feeding the scrap into the steel melting furnaces. The Company’s manufacturing operations are being optimized to reduce the usage of hazardous chemicals in the processes. Hazardous waste like sludges, waste or residues containing oil are directed to cement industries for co-incineration as per Tamil Nadu Pollution Control Board (TNPCB) norms and the remaining hazardous wastes are recycled through TNPCB authorized agencies. Apart from that, sludge generated from Sewage Treatment Plant (STP) is being used as manure for green belt development activities as per the Consent To Operate (CTO) issued by TNPCB.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureWebLinkOfEntityAtWhi: The Company has a dedicated Emergency Response team (ERT) across all the sites to address all potential risks and ensure the continuity of operations and protect the business's bottom line. The ERT members are trained on potential incidents and mock drills are conducted to identify the gaps and ensure the right process is followed.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DiscloseAnySignificantAdverseI: There is no significant adverse impact on the environment, arising from the value chain of SFL.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheTradeAndIndustryChamb: Automotive Component Manufacturers Association of India
Export Promotion Council of EOUs and SEZ
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: The Company's HR teams from the respective manufacturing units are tasked with receving and redressing grievances of the communities close to the units. Any major grievances are taken up by the corporate HR team.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:CSRProject: Krishna Educational Society (KES) (Sundram Matriculation Higher Secondary School)
Banyan Academy of Leadership in Mental Health (BALM) - SFL Centre for Social Action & Research-Education and Research in Mental health (Education and research in mental health)
Sugan Thomas Foundation (Education support and mentoring for economically challenged students)
KREA University (Contribution to Krea University for conducting research studies in the area of Operations Management, Marketing, Mathematics and Environmental Studies)
Credit for NAPS/NATS (Stipend paid to apprentices towards skill building)
Clarke School for the deaf and mentally retarded (Special educacation for children with special needs)
Rotary (Construction of toilets in Thanipoondi and Poovalmbedu villages in Tiruvallur District)
Ray of Light Foundation (Cost of cancer treatment for children)
Cancer Institute [WIA] (To provide financial support for the purchase of Surface Guided Radiotherapy equipment)
Resource Group for Education and Advocacy for Community Health (REACH) (Cost of Tubercolosis traetment for patients)
Contribution to SPSS Trust towards Musical Festival
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: SFL conducts customer satisfaction surveys annually on the basis of QCD (Quality, Cost and Delivery) aspects which includes equality, delivery, logistics, and new product development. The Company reviews customer feedbacks and prioritizes addressing the complaints within seven days with detailed action plans. Trends of customer satisfaction is aso tracked and monitored regularly for all manufacturing units.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RemarkForConsumerComplaints: SFL supplies domestic and global OEMs and after market segments. The materials supplied by SFL then goes into end products manufactures by the OEMs. There is no direct sale to consumers.
SFL supplies domestic and global OEMs and after market segments. The materials supplied by SFL then goes into end products manufactures by the OEMs. There is no direct sale to consumers.
SFL supplies domestic and global OEMs and after market segments. The materials supplied by SFL then goes into end products manufactures by the OEMs. There is no direct sale to consumers.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfThePolicyOnCyberSecur: The Company has developed an information security policy which has been made available to all the employees. The policy guides the employees about the principles to protect critical information assets of the organisation from any data breaches and is available in the intranet portal of the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: There have been no issues related to advertising, and delivery of essential services; cyber security and data privacy of customers; re-occurence of instances of product recalls.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WeblinkWhereInformationOnProdu: Information regarding the products and services can be accessed via the link mentioned below :- www.sundram.com
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StepsTakenToInformAndEducateCo: SFL supplies to domestic and global OEMs and after market segments. The materials supplied by SFL then goes into end products manufactured by the OEMs. To the extent legally required, SFL captures the details about safe and responsible usage of products it manufactures.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsInPlaceToInformConsu: SFL supplies to domestic and global OEMs and after market segments. The products manufactured by the Company are engineered to OEM's specifications that are directly integrated into the assembly. Consequently, there is no interaction with the consumers directly.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProductInformationOnT: The Company displays all the relevant information prescribed under the Legal Metrology Act, 2009.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple9ExplanatoryText: SFL carries out consumer satisfaction surveys across all manufacturing locations to collect feedback on aspects such as quality, cost, and delivery as explained in question no 1 of the Essential Indicator.
